# Product Requirements Document (PRD)

## Problem & Background
Summarize the problem being solved and why it matters.

## Product Intent & Objectives
List key goals and target capabilities.

## Non-Goals (Explicit Exclusions)
Explicitly document what is OUT of scope to prevent scope creep.

## User Persona & Acceptance Criteria
- **User Flow**: High-level interaction flow.
- **Acceptance Criteria**: Verifiable criteria for completion.
